message:
fix(ci): repair release workflow — stub missing submodule, use ARM macOS runner

Three issues prevented all release builds from succeeding:

1. The legacy_pi_mono_code/pi-mono submodule has no .gitmodules entry,
   so it is never checked out in CI. The include_str!() in src/models.rs
   then fails at compile time. Add `submodules: recursive` to the
   checkout step and a fallback that creates a minimal stub TypeScript
   file when the submodule cannot be resolved.

2. The `macos-15-intel` runner label requires a paid "larger runners"
   plan. Switch the x86_64-apple-darwin build to `macos-15` (ARM64) and
   cross-compile instead — Apple's toolchain handles this natively.

3. Upgrade the aarch64-apple-darwin runner from `macos-14` to `macos-15`
   for consistency with the x86_64 build.

Fixes part of #5.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -112,10 +112,11 @@ jobs:
           - os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
             asset: pi-linux-arm64
-          - os: macos-15-intel
+          - os: macos-15
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
             asset: pi-darwin-amd64
-          - os: macos-14
+            cross: true
+          - os: macos-15
             target: aarch64-apple-darwin
             asset: pi-darwin-arm64
           - os: windows-latest
@@ -137,6 +138,24 @@ jobs:
           path: pi_agent_rust
           fetch-depth: 0
           ref: ${{ needs.plan.outputs.tag }}
+          submodules: recursive
+
+      - name: Ensure submodule content exists
+        run: |
+          # The legacy_pi_mono_code/pi-mono submodule may lack a .gitmodules
+          # entry, which prevents automatic checkout. Create a minimal stub so
+          # the include_str!() in src/models.rs compiles even when the
+          # submodule cannot be resolved.
+          MODELS_TS="legacy_pi_mono_code/pi-mono/packages/ai/src/models.generated.ts"
+          if [ ! -f "$MODELS_TS" ]; then
+            echo "::warning::Submodule file missing — creating stub: $MODELS_TS"
+            mkdir -p "$(dirname "$MODELS_TS")"
+            cat > "$MODELS_TS" <<'STUB'
+          // Stub generated by CI — the real file lives in the pi-mono submodule.
+          // See: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/pi_agent_rust/issues/5
+          export const MODELS = {} as const;
+          STUB
+          fi
 
       - name: Checkout asupersync
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
